63010.name: The DeadPool
63010.description: You are surrounded by a mass of cold, murky blood!

63022.name: Within Taelabilreth
63022.description: Piles of loose stone block your way within Taelabilreth, although there were once obvious passages in many directions, evidenced by the arches near the ceiling. A set of slick steps lead upward, and no other exit is apparent.

63000.name: The Rocky Hills
63000.description: Vegetation thins here along a trail through the rocky hills. Northeast tower a pair of mountains, both of formidable proportions, yet the further of the two dwarves the nearer.

63001.name: The Rocky Hills
63001.description: You pause along a trail through the rocky eastern hills, near the base of twin- mountains north and northeast. Legends of treasure and the living jade are recalled as you recognize the pair as Taelabilreth the younger, and Shimaelbevat the elder. You can continue east or west through the rocky hills from this point, or descend a steep slope downward just to the south.

63002.name: The Rocky Hills
63002.description: The meandering path through the rocky hills halts here at a darkened junction at the very base of Taelabilreth, where a steep trail leads north toward its southern face. Reflected in a pool to your east among a circle of boulders is the larger Shimaelbevat. Shadows from the mounts cross here both day and night, as the skys remain oddly clear, the air crisp and sharp.

63003.name: Mount Taelabilreth
63003.description: Here upon the base of Taelabilreth the rocks jut outward, most bearing multiple scars where thick chunks of jade have been pried away. This place is cold, empty, and devoid of the treasure it was long ago fabled for. A steep trail leads upward into the shadows of the surrounding peaks.

63006.name: The Rocky Hills
63006.description: At the foot of the formidable mount Taelabilreth, an unmoving, placid pool of icy water has collected among the rocks. Preternaturally still, a hissing black mist flows over its surface, dispersing among the nearby rocky hills. A thin footpath winds westward, and the hills continue to the east.

63011.name: The Rocky Hills
63011.description: You pick your way through the rocky hills, at the edge of a daunting mountain range which rises northward. To the west, at the base of the nearest mount is a glassy, still pool of liquid. The hills continue to the east, slowly descending toward plains in the southeastern distance.

63012.name: The Rocky Hills
63012.description: An occasional lone, twisted tree rises up from between the stray boulders here among the rocky hills. A chilly breeze sweeps down from the mountains to the north, and great, barren plains stretch out far to the east, and to the southeast. Beyond the hills and plains due southward can be seen a spreading forest of oaks.

63013.name: The Rocky Hills
63013.description: A winding path ventures downward here between the rocky hills, travelling east, and west. High mountain peaks are clearly visibile to the north, their tips disappearing into the clouds.

63014.name: The Rocky Hills
63014.description: A twisting path here winds northward, up into the nearby mountains, which are shrouded in a billowing black mist. The rocky hills extend to the west, and to the southeast a towering structure of chisled stone can be seen.

63015.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
63015.description: Billowing charcoal mist envelopes you along this twisted path winding its way into the mountains. The jagged face of Taelabilreth rises in the west, in contrast to the stark, empty gorge splayed open to your east. A brittle, crunch accompanies your footfalls along the path, which offers passage further up into these darkened mountains, and southward toward the rocky hills, where can be seen the outline of a towering stone gate.

e.to_room_name: At the Bottom of a Chasm

63021.name: Steps Within Taelabilreth
63021.description: Narrow wooden steps lead downward from the retreat, into mount Taelabilreth. Moisture collects upon the rocky surface of the surrounding walls, dripping down from above, slickening step and wall alike. A hint of fresh air drifts up from below, but no more.

63023.name: Chasm Bottom
63023.description: The chasm proves to be as narrow here at its bottom as it would seem to be from atop, ending here before a solid wall of stone, to which many looss, jumbled piles of smaller stones huddle. The prevaling mist billows all about, still visited by an occasional crackle of stray electricity.

63024.name: Chasm Bottom
63024.description: A rockslide, or perhaps several, have deposited an insurmountable obstacle of cracked and broken stones here at the bottom of a mist-filled chasm, making the only available exit back from when you came, to the north. The pile stands several meters high, and are rife with brittle, jagged edges, making climbing an unlikely prospect.

63025.name: Chasm Bottom
63025.description: You stand in the centre of the chasm bottom, the rough walls of stone ascending all about. Cold and hot winds swirl violently here, gathering loose stones and depositing them in jumbled piles, the movements ignored by the small, chitenous creatures feasting upon various corpses left here to rot. Travel appears to be possible further to the south, and to the east.

w.to_room_name: At the Bottom of a Chasm

63026.name: Cluttered Cave
63026.description: You've come to the dead-end of this cramped, dingy cave. Oddly, it is warmer here, the walls seeming to radiate a slight heat. Gathered in loose piles upon the floor are the crumbling remains of a bedroll made from the skin of animals along with several utensils carved from bone. A perfect circle of stones surrounds a meager pit filled with ash. The cave curves and exits to the east.

63027.name: Cluttered Cave
63027.description: The walls of the cave quickly close in past its entrance, forming a short and narrow passage further west. The chill from the chasm bottom, strangely, fails to invade this small subterranean refuge. Warm gold veins gleam faintly beneath the surface.

63028.name: Chasm Bottom
63028.description: The mist swirls here among the stray rocks collecting at the bottom of the chasm, around a jagged opening in the chasm wall. Several of the larger stones here appear to have been purposefully arranged and piled atop one another to form a table, or perhaps an altar.

s.to_room_name: At the Bottom of a Chasm

63029.name: At the Bottom of a Chasm
63029.description: You stand at the bottom of a narrow chasm among the shrouded mountains, which rise high above, vanishing into an ethereal ebon mist. Untamed, thin bolts of energy streak by among the rocks strewn about the rough stone chasm floor. Mingled with the natural wreckage here are the remains of several zombies, decayed and in pieces.

63030.name: Edge of the Rocky Hills
63030.description: The hills slowly taper off into flatlands here which extend far, far off into the distance south and southeast. A huge gate of standing stones rests at the edge of the plains, to the south.

63031.name: Sevenrock Gate
63031.description: You stand at the base of a mammoth gate formed by piled stones, here at the edge of the barren plains. The gate consists of two columns which are three stones high each, and the seventh lay across the top to join the two. The rocky hills extend to the west.

63039.name: Among the Mountains
63039.description: A narrow path upon the nearest mountainside ceases its twisting here, where the base of two meet. A passage has been blasted by some great force at this point, creating a roughly arched entryway into the depths of the mountains themselves. Slightly ahead and to the east, a narrow rushing river churns between the rising mounds of earth and stone.

w.to_zone: Tomb of Antryg - Three Shadows Mountains

63004.name: Mount Taelabilreth
63004.description: Complete darkness dominates this portion of the southern face of mount Taelabilreth, where three distinct shadows cross and merge in both day and night. The feeling here is both natural and unnatural; you are surrounded by living monuments to the geometry of nature, yet they have been raped and left barren of the jade once held within. Where precisely the crossing shadows originate is difficult to determine despite multiple peaks rising all about. The trail ascending here continues northward, and another leads to the west along the edge of the mountain, toward a squarish granite building, its door the sole remaining jade among this ravaged terrain.

63005.name: Threeshadows Retreat
63005.description: Within the confines of a large mountain retreat you find several large, padded chairs covered in the skins of long-bested beasts, strewn about in a rough semi- circle. A tremendous fireplace encompasses the northern wall, an eternal fire crackling as it radiates heat. A tapestry of finely spun silk covers most of the eastern wall of the modest retreat, and a pair of crossed swords rest opposite, above a narrow hall leading deeper into the mountainside retreat.

63007.name: Threeshadows Tavern
63007.description: A small tavern occupies the northern corner of Threeshadow's retreat, its walls ornately decorated with painted renderings from the surrounding lands to the east. Barren stretches of blood covered fields adorn one wall, and a curious image of twin suns casting beams through the nearby triple peaks adorns another.

63008.name: Threeshadows Retreat
63008.description: A narrow hall leads from the greater portion of the retreat westward, into the mountain itself. The walls are roughstone, somewhat polished by time, and burnished in places by the licking sconce fires set at elven eye level.

63009.name: Storeroom
63009.description: A modest storeroom, neatly organized and kept well cleaned. Stacked crates of travelling supplies and equipment rest here, each within an oddly glowing ward, presumably to keep thieves -- or rodents -- from pilfering the goods. A narrow doorway leads out to a hallway, south. Along one wall hang rows of simple tools, old rusty keys, and pieces of animal hides, slowly drying.

63016.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
63016.description: You tread upon a winding path among the mountains, shrouded in an oddly shimmering black mist. The way twists upward, ascending to some unseen point, and downward, where below lay the rocky hills. Small, gnarled trees line both sides of this mountain trail, caught in the shadow of the solemn peaks surrounding.

63017.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
63017.description: Sharp flashes of pale blue light erupt from a thickening mist as it drifts through the brittle branches of small, dead trees aside this twisting path of crushed bone among the mountains. Short, periodic burts of icy wind rush down from above, violently disturbing the veil of ebon mist.

63018.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
63018.description: The path begins to slope sharply upward here, ascending to a summit shrouded in fog. The moisture in the air clings to your skin and lies heavy in your lungs. The trees creak and sway in the wind, giving them the semblance of life.

63019.name: Upon the Shrouded Mountain
63019.description: The bone crunches sharply beneath your feet. A morbid thought enters your mind: How many bones did it take to pave the road, and who were the donors? The mist seems to coalesce about everthing that does not move. It mutes all sound except the snapping of the awful gravel. The way zigzags sharply to the east and west.

63020.name: Threeshadows Retreat
63020.description: The hall terminates here within the mountainside, at a slight decline where a simple iron grate rests in the floor. The hall and place fires of the retreat glow to the east.

63037.name: Among the Mountains
63037.description: A rocky path ventures through the mountains, just east of the predominant Taelabilreth. Shadows cross and overlap, darkening the areas, leaving it in an eternal chill. The remnants of mining encampments dot the landscape, abandoned long ago. The path offers transit to the north and to the south.

63038.name: Among the Mountains
63038.description: You trek along a well-worn and over-mined mountainside, swept by ceaseless winds and beholden to a biting chill. A twisted path among the rocks offers precarious passage downward, and to the south, where an embedded structure can be seen upon the surface of the largest of these mountains.
